headline: Roche Oncology Milestones Spark Fresh Look At Valuation And Growth Potential
summary: Roche Holding received U.S. FDA Priority Review for Tecentriq plus chemotherapy as a potential adjuvant treatment for stage III dMMR/MSI-H colon cancer. The Tecentriq filing targets patients after surgery, where treatment options remain limited for this biomarker-defined group. In parallel, the VENTANA MMR RxDx Panel secured expanded EU IVDR approval, covering additional solid tumor types to support precision patient selection. These regulatory steps highlight progress in oncology for...
